name: Xrf Scientific Limited
analysis: XRF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.8700, stop A$1.7721, target A$2.2000 (3.37:1) — then trail it.
